metadata.title: GobahTech | Essam Gobah - Tech Engineering
metadata.description: Transforming your physical shop into digital success. Travel, Study, and Info platforms.

about.title: My Journey from
about.bento1_desc: From studying Computer Science in Yemen to mastering network architecture and complex software engineering in Russia. Currently based in Moscow, I build market-leading platforms, turning complex ideas into invincible digital products.
about.bento2_desc: Of hands-on experience building, scaling, and architecting web infrastructures since 2014.
about.bento3_desc: Launched and managed successful projects across continents, ranging from tourism platforms to high-scale e-commerce.
about.bento4_desc: It's not just about building a system; it's about building it with zero resource waste and peak sustainable performance.
about.bento5_desc: Got an exceptional idea? Let's turn it into a reality that dominates search engines and the market.

heroV2.sub: I'm Essam Gobah — a developer and network engineer with 12+ years of experience. I build platforms that grow businesses, from tourism and e-commerce to enterprise systems.

hero.description: Travel platforms, Study academies, Info portals. We build everything easily.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.description: Got questions? I answer them with complete engineering transparency.

0.question: How much does a website or an app cost?
0.answer: Cost depends entirely on the scope and features of your project. I don't use pre-priced templates; I engineer custom systems tailored to your budget without compromising quality.

1.question: Why shouldn't I just use AI to build my site in seconds?
1.answer: AI builds generic templates and automated "spaghetti code" that breaks under scale. I engineer robust, secure architectures with deep human UX/UI that actual businesses rely on.

2.question: What is the timeline for a project?
2.answer: Medium-sized projects typically take 2-4 weeks for the first version. I build everything from scratch, focusing on micro-animations, performance, and flawless delivery.

3.question: Are there any hidden fees or hosting traps?
3.answer: Transparency is my first priority. I will clearly explain the hosting costs (paid directly to service providers) based on your project scale and guide you to the most stable and cost-effective options. There are no mandatory monthly maintenance fees or hidden charges.

4.question: How do you guarantee the quality of the work?
4.answer: I don't hand over a project without rigorous performance testing. You don't pay the final installment until you are 100% satisfied with speed, design, and scalability.

contact.title: Let's Engineer Your Idea
contact.description: Whether you have a fully-fledged project or just an initial idea, reach out to discuss technical and business details professionally.

footer.description: Making advanced technology accessible the easiest way.
